Why OK ERP

Pehle aur ab

✕Manual register mein bill likhna — time waste aur galtiyan
✕Stock kab khatam hua — pata hi nahi chala
✕Repair status ke liye customer ko baar baar call karna padta tha
✕Staff ki attendance track karna bahut mushkil tha
✕GST filing ke liye data dhundhna bahut time leta tha

OK ERP ke saath ab:

✓30 second mein professional GST bill — print ya WhatsApp pe
✓Stock automatically track — low stock alert milega pehle se
✓Repair ready hone par customer ko auto WhatsApp message
✓GPS geofence se staff attendance automatic aur accurate
✓GST-1 Excel ek click mein download — CA ke liye ready

How It Works

Shuru karna bahut easy hai

Hum sab setup karte hain — aapko kuch nahi karna

1

WhatsApp ya Call karo

Bas ek message ya call karo. Hum same day respond karte hain.

WhatsApp Karo Call Karo
2

Hum aapka account banate hain

Aapki dukaan ka naam, details leke hum manually aapka account setup karte hain. Koi form nahi bharna.

3

Login link milega WhatsApp pe

Aapko seedha WhatsApp pe login link aur password milega. Phone ya laptop — dono pe chalega.

4

Setup mein help milegi

Pehle din hum saath mein software setup karte hain — inventory add karna, billing try karna sab. Hindi mein.

5

Saare updates WhatsApp pe milenge

Jab bhi naya feature aaye, update ho — aapko WhatsApp pe seedha bata denge. Koi extra kuch nahi karna.

📢 Updates always on WhatsApp
